productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Chanderi Navy Blue Stole
description: Style Note fabindia's natural, craft-based pieces pay tribute to small business artisans in rural India.   This earthy stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its Jaipur patterning. The print is handbloacked - a painstaking process with almost 500 block repeats per metre! Twist this piece into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric on your skin.  Product Details Blue Chanderi stole with hemmed sides Material and Care Silk cotton blend Dry clean only Size Approximate length: 190 cm Approximate width: 55 cm
